afae9c386ad3f94ede66a3933dee22e0.description: From Evidence to Action: Join the SDN Global Café Exploring the UK’s First Public Design Evidence Review with Professor Lucy Kimbell and David Singer. Join us on 18 March, 2026!

044d3a058ed72c53780d0d65a728aa42.description: Join us for the Service Design Global Conference 2026 (SDGC26) in Germany and online on 28-30 October!

9fcb944b38ad6e126d346f60c4b52cb8.summary: IN SESSION: Designing Leadership in a World Changed by AI
9fcb944b38ad6e126d346f60c4b52cb8.description: This free talk will explore what it truly takes to design the right conditions for leadership. So people can organise themselves mindfully, partner effectively with AI, and lead change that lasts.

e2f2c39719c94b570e1196bed12d36de.description: Germany’s leading cross-functional professional education and networking event focused on software product development, including UX/Design. The summit targets UX-Designers, Product- and Digital Managers, and Software Engineers. Day 1 (November 17) is the AI Deep Dive Day at Smartvillage Cologne, focusing on the practical application of AI across product, design, and engineering. Day 2 (November 18) is the Conference Day at Palladium Cologne, featuring talks, interviews, panels, and masterclasses for Product, Engineering, and UX Design professionals to learn how to develop better digital products.

094d2be6dcae23900315fc092823512d.description: Turn Your Passion into Expertise – Become a Certified Practitioner! You want to build a solid foundation for your service design practice? You want to gather theoretical foundations, methodological skills and practical experience? Then this Service Design Practitioner Curriculum is the program for you!

0cec71803a6983ffde45042c5d0b3912.summary: Service Design Masterclasses Series: 4th Edition Open for Registration
0cec71803a6983ffde45042c5d0b3912.description: Strengthen your core skills, expand your capabilities, and earn professional accreditation from the Service Design Network Academy.

07ffae25f8eafd321a5056e3bf9e2443.location: Frankfurt RheinMain region, Wiesbaden (RheinMain Congress Center) and online
07ffae25f8eafd321a5056e3bf9e2443.description: The Service Design Global Conference 2026 (SDGC26) takes place 28-30 October in the Frankfurt RheinMain region, both onsite at the RheinMain Congress Center in Wiesbaden and online. This event aims to discover how service design drives innovation and transforms modern organizations. The theme, 'Beyond Boundaries: Enabling Solutions That Shape Tomorrow,' explores moving past limits to shape resilient, meaningful futures through service design. The program includes workshops, an SDN Members Event, conference days with speakers, and networking opportunities.

ab0aa9c15394862cc8023099d808ae27.summary: Digitale Leute Summit 2026: Germany's leading cross-functional conference for Product, Engineering, and UX/Design.
ab0aa9c15394862cc8023099d808ae27.location: Cologne, Germany (AI Deep Dive Day at Smartvillage Cologne, Conference Day at Palladium Cologne)
ab0aa9c15394862cc8023099d808ae27.description: The Digitale Leute Summit 2026 is a two-day event focused on software product development, with a strong emphasis on UX/Design. Day 1, the AI Deep Dive Day (November 17 at Smartvillage Cologne), offers a bootcamp-style experience on practical AI application across product, design, and engineering workflows. Day 2, the Conference Day (November 18 at Palladium Cologne), features international speakers, talks, interviews, panels, and masterclasses, providing insights into tools, tactics, and methods for developing better digital products for professionals in UX Design, Product, and Engineering.

87031da64cf63f1095b85b94bd7d5514.description: Momentum is gathering in the run up to the Service Design (SD) Conference Europe, as IRM UK launches the live agenda and announces the first speakers. The Service Design conference, co-founded by IRM UK and AssistKD in 2025, will take place in London from 8th to 12th June 2026. It will be co-located with the Enterprise and Business Architecture (EBA) Conference Europe and the Business Change and Transformation (BCT) Conference Europe (BCT), bringing together the worlds of architecture, transformation and service design. Jonathan Hunsley (AssistKD) and Victoria Banner (Royal London Group) will be holding a workshop on the afternoon of Wednesday June 10th on the topic of introducing service frameworks to enhance clarity, standards, and collaboration across the change ecosystem. For the conference agenda and how to book, please follow this link: https://irmuk.co.uk/2026/02/eba-bct-sd-conference-europe-2026-speakersarticle/

8980df12c88db009ee932e4bc1b3180f.location: Convene 133 Houndsditch, London; etc.venues Fenchurch Street, London
8980df12c88db009ee932e4bc1b3180f.description: Join us at the Service Design Conference Europe 2026, co-located with the Business Change & Transformation Conference and the Enterprise & Business Architecture Conference. This unique trio of events offers a transformative experience, redefining your understanding of Enterprise Architecture, Business Architecture, Service Design, Design strategies, and Business Change & Transformation.

9b763d9731e8a021982a72c10e942eed.summary: Gamification in Fintech: From Boosting Engagement to Becoming a Lovemark
9b763d9731e8a021982a72c10e942eed.description: Craft Innovations holds a session to explore how gamification impacts product goals, like retention, feature adoption, transaction frequency, loyalty, and more. Ideal for Product Managers in fintech and banking; UX / CX designers working on complex products; founders building consumer or B2B fintech solutions; innovation, growth, and digital teams.

03bdd37d584f8df1c2d46a92ea447085.description: AWE Asia is the region's leading annual conference for the Extended Reality (XR) industry, spanning Augmented Reality (AR), Virtual Reality (VR), and related Metaverse technologies. It brings together XR enterprise adopters, solution providers, developers, investors, creators, governments, and media. The conference includes two days of thought-provoking sessions, extensive networking opportunities, and an expo. Ideal for AR, XR, and VR practitioners.

4de7db192c026807e687685e09d6a31e.description: A two-day virtual summit focused on sharpening UX research skills and gaining inspiration from real-world case studies. It offers insights, practical frameworks, and live discussions with UX leaders. Ideal for anyone deep into UX research or shaping product strategy.

1070a16a25c2a1b7585825859407a12c.summary: The prompt:UX Conference focuses on the intersection of artificial intelligence and user experience design, gathering designers, researchers, and product managers to explore how AI is reshaping UX.
1070a16a25c2a1b7585825859407a12c.description: The prompt:UX Conference focuses on the intersection of artificial intelligence and user experience design, gathering designers, researchers, and product managers to explore how AI is reshaping UX and how to prepare strategies, tools, and workflows accordingly. Expect engaging keynotes from industry leaders, hands-on workshops, case studies, and a dedicated networking reception, all aimed at helping your team integrate AI into UX in meaningful, future-ready ways. If you’re looking to stay at the forefront of AI-powered UX design and research, this conference offers the insights, practical learning, and connections to make that happen.

acb6b7893fea51a0710259843c22b9e3.summary: DDX Tokyo brings together leaders in digital innovation, UX, design, product, and customer research. The theme "Innovation Meets Impact" emphasizes how user experience, AI, and strategic design converge to deliver measurable business outcomes.
acb6b7893fea51a0710259843c22b9e3.description: DDX Tokyo brings together leaders in digital innovation, UX, design, product, and customer research. The theme "Innovation Meets Impact" emphasizes how user experience, AI, and strategic design converge to deliver measurable business outcomes. Expect a one-day programme of keynotes, panels, round-tables, and networking in a dynamic global setting.

7626c3184f91eeccd3fa5266fc02ca30.summary: The UX360 Virtual Summit is a global online event for UX researchers and designers from around the world. It covers the full research journey — from planning and conducting studies to turning insights into actionable business outcomes.
7626c3184f91eeccd3fa5266fc02ca30.description: The UX360 Virtual Summit is a global online event for UX researchers and designers from around the world. It covers the full research journey — from planning and conducting studies to turning insights into actionable business outcomes. Expect impactful keynotes, real-world case studies, interactive panels, round-tables, and high-value networking sessions — all delivered virtually. This is the must-attend virtual summit for UX research practitioners looking to level up their insight practice, connect globally, and drive measurable impact.

Covering the entire research journey from planning and conducting studies to turning insights into actionable business outcomes, the event features thought-provoking keynotes, interactive panels, inspiring round-tables, and high-value 1-to-1 networking. It is a must-attend event for UX researchers & designers seeking inspiration, knowledge, and connections, focusing on empowering UX research to influence, scale & lead with the theme: 'From Invisible to Indispensable'.

72521ac420b32ef7defb3203b1c715d5.description: The DESIGN Conference aims to bring together researchers and practitioners who have worked on or thought about engineering and industrial design from various perspectives, disciplines, and fields. It serves as a forum for discussing and advancing engineering design knowledge—spanning engineering design science, computer science, cognitive science, philosophy, methodological innovation, and the practical application of design research. The conference covers topics such as DESIGN THEORY AND RESEARCH METHODS, DESIGN ORGANISATION, COLLABORATION AND MANAGEMENT, DESIGN INFORMATION AND KNOWLEDGE, DESIGN METHODS AND TOOLS, HUMAN BEHAVIOUR AND DESIGN CREATIVITY, DESIGN FOR SUSTAINABILITY, DESIGN FOR HEALTHCARE, DESIGN FOR ADDITIVE MANUFACTURING, ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND DATA-DRIVEN DESIGN, INDUSTRIAL DESIGN, SYSTEMS ENGINEERING AND DESIGN, DESIGN EDUCATION, and ENGINEERING DESIGN PRACTICE.

49cca0ec183445d91b51494cb716e993.type: Professional Conference and Workshops (in-person and online)
49cca0ec183445d91b51494cb716e993.description: A 4-day Smashing Conference on UX and front-end for designers, UI engineers, and UX professionals. The event includes 2 conference days with a single track featuring 12 speakers and 2 workshop days with 6 practical, deep-dive workshops. Topics covered include Design Systems, accessibility, Figma, UX writing, modern CSS, AI, leadership, data visualization, and human-centered interfaces, ranging from research to CSS and interface design. The conference focuses on real-world problems and solutions, offering practical and actionable insights through interactive sessions. It's an inclusive event for 550 attendees, providing networking opportunities, job opportunities, and side activities like morning runs, yoga, boat tours, and photo walks.

It explores topics such as Product Design & UX Practice, Experience Economics, Shifting Careers, Practical AI, Design Impact, and Trends & Innovation. 6be1c47803d8c530cd939c816d84065f.description: PUSH UX 2026 is a professional conference for experienced UX & Product professionals. It's Europe’s UX & Product Design Event, held live in Munich. The event explores topics such as Product Design & UX Practice, Experience Economics, Shifting Careers, Practical AI, Design Impact, and Trends & Innovation. It aims to connect experienced Product Designers, UX Professionals, Researchers, User Minded Product Managers, and Creative Developers – from expert ICs to seasoned Leaders. This international UX conference has been going strong since 2012.

Covers the entire research journey from planning and conducting studies to turning insights into actionable business outcomes, featuring thought-provoking keynotes, interactive panels, inspiring round-tables and high-value 1-to-1 networking. A must-attend event for UX researchers & designers seeking inspiration, knowledge, and connections.

88a3cce9a7b086799ef152fa5a7d964f.summary: The QRCA Annual Conference is a four-day gathering of qualitative research professionals to share and shape the future of qualitative research, including user-insights research.
88a3cce9a7b086799ef152fa5a7d964f.description: The QRCA Annual Conference is a four-day gathering of qualitative research professionals in Texas. It brings together researchers, moderators, analysts, strategists, suppliers, and insights partners across experience levels to share — and shape — the future of qualitative research. Expect a rich programme of interactive sessions, workshops, keynotes, small-group discussions, and networking designed to spark ideas, build skills, and deepen relationships in a fun, engaging environment. If you work in qualitative or user-insights research and want to grow your craft, expand your network, and stay at the forefront of the field, this conference delivers.

6e7ce003ed301987c7e24255b59e366a.description: The Web Summit Qatar 2026 brings together leading minds in technology, business, and innovation for four days of keynotes, masterclasses, talks, and networking opportunities at the Doha Exhibition and Convention Center (DECC). With access to tracks across industries and curated meetups, attendees can connect with founders, investors, and global tech professionals. Tickets start at QR 1,995 (~$550) and include access to the main program, Night Summit, and networking events designed to inspire and accelerate growth in tech and digital products.

d4b63c800efce29a19045c7bf474021f.summary: The QRCA 2026 Annual Conference is the go-to event for anyone in the qualitative research industry to share ideas, learn from experts, and meet other professionals.
d4b63c800efce29a19045c7bf474021f.description: The QRCA 2026 Annual Conference is the go‑to event for anyone in the qualitative research industry to share ideas, learn from experts, and meet other professionals in an engaging environment. Whether you want to grow your skills, hear fresh perspectives, or connect with peers at all levels of experience, this conference delivers interactive sessions, small‑group discussions, and plenty of networking opportunities. The in‑person event is built around collaboration and practical learning, with workshops, talks, and events that help you take new tools and insights back to your work. Set in the vibrant city of San Antonio, the conference brings together qualitative researchers from around the world for four days of inspiration, connection, and shared growth.

ad6bb9dc6cf6a97b6bdf13f8acb2ca27.summary: The UX360 Research Summit 2026 is an online event focused on user experience and design research.
ad6bb9dc6cf6a97b6bdf13f8acb2ca27.description: The UX360 Research Summit 2026 is an online event over two days with expert‑led presentations, interactive panel discussions, and connections focused on user experience and design research. Sessions cover the full UX research journey from planning and conducting studies to analysis and turning insights into action. The schedule runs in Eastern Daylight Time (8 am–4 pm) and Central European Time (2 pm–10 pm) to make it accessible across time zones. This virtual summit is essential for UX research professionals who want to enhance their skills, connect with peers worldwide, and make a real impact with their insights.

0d9a3916e4a6a8d1f5c8c388adfcf1d5.summary: DDX Dubai 2026 is a two‑day UX and digital innovation conference for designers, product professionals, researchers, and technology leaders.
0d9a3916e4a6a8d1f5c8c388adfcf1d5.type: UX, Digital Innovation, Design, Product Design, Technology
0d9a3916e4a6a8d1f5c8c388adfcf1d5.description: DDX Dubai 2026 is a two‑day UX and digital innovation conference for designers, product professionals, researchers, and technology leaders. The event brings together global and regional experts to explore how innovation, design, and digital experience shape the future. Over two days, you can join inspiring talks, panels, workshops, and roundtable sessions that focus on topics like UX, product design, leadership, methodologies, and technology. With around 30 speakers, 12 workshops, and opportunities to network with 600+ peers, DDX Dubai blends practical insights with community interaction. Attendees can connect, learn new techniques, and gain fresh perspectives to take back to their work.

9c7a19b5f9bb223c3b27efbbb8202957.summary: SXSW 2026 is a cross-industry gathering exploring the future of design, tech, culture, and media, including sessions on UX, AI, and design thinking.
9c7a19b5f9bb223c3b27efbbb8202957.type: Design, Technology, Culture, Media, User Experience, AI, Design Thinking, Accessibility, Digital Innovation
9c7a19b5f9bb223c3b27efbbb8202957.description: SXSW 2026 is a massive cross-industry gathering of creatives, technologists, founders, and innovators exploring the future of design, tech, culture, and media. While not a UX-specific conference, SXSW includes dozens of sessions and workshops on user experience, AI, design thinking, accessibility, and digital innovation — all highly relevant for teams building better products. Held over seven days in downtown Austin, the event blends keynotes, panels, film premieres, startup showcases, and immersive experiences across multiple venues. It’s an ideal space to connect with forward-thinking teams, discover early trends, and show how easy, fast, and affordable user testing can empower better design decisions.

983831a148baa778fd80c87aca0f9259.summary: ConveyUX 2026 is a premier user experience event designed for leaders and UX professionals.
983831a148baa778fd80c87aca0f9259.description: The annual ConveyUX conference will be held at the Grand Hyatt Seattle in April 2026. This premier user experience event is designed for leaders and UX professionals seeking to innovate, drive transforma

5c2e72ee9532a40962a853473bd0f54e.summary: Top design conference for UX designers, researchers, product teams, and design leaders covering technical design, strategy, business topics, and AI impact.
5c2e72ee9532a40962a853473bd0f54e.description: Hatch Conference is one of the top design conferences in Europe in 2026. It brings together UX designers, researchers, product teams, and design leaders for three days of talks and workshops covering technical design, strategy, business topics, and the impact of AI on design work. If you are looking for deep content, strong curation, and a community of experienced practitioners, Hatch is one of the best choices in the region.

0418a0988fb9f65ac248f6e13d2c972d.summary: Hands-on design leadership event series for designers moving into or deepening leadership practice, with workshops and masterclasses.
0418a0988fb9f65ac248f6e13d2c972d.description: While not specifically a conference, it is the only hands-on design leadership event in Europe, that still fits in most people's L&D budget. Leadership Ateliers is a series of highly focused events designed for designers moving into leadership or deepening their leadership practice. Each edition offers small group workshops and masterclasses that develop the strategic, communication, and people skills needed in modern product organizations. Barcelona supports designers working in complex industries with organizational and technological constraints. Lisbon guides junior and mid senior leaders in aligning design decisions with company strategy. Berlin helps ICs transition into team lead and design lead roles with confidence. Amsterdam supports senior leaders through guided peer sessions that explore leadership identity, AI, and the realities of running design teams.

c098a9b2f7626b29620514caf04aae53.summary: Flagship event for design leaders across Europe, focusing on leadership, people management, and organizational influence with keynotes from global tech leaders.
c098a9b2f7626b29620514caf04aae53.description: A flagship event for design leaders across Europe. Leading Design London brings together Heads of Design, Directors, and VPs who want to grow in leadership, people management, and organizational influence. The speaker lineup consistently attracts experienced leaders from global tech in a traditional single-track conference of multiple keynotes one after the other. Some workshops are available to buy separately.

213e54666ff00e09e95ec3a13a7a3b3d.summary: Community-driven conference focused on practical design and front-end topics, known for being affordable, friendly, and packed with real-world insights.

e773a956b166e33e5e8e695454d38e01.summary: Service Design Conference Europe 2026 (Conference and Exhibits)
e773a956b166e33e5e8e695454d38e01.description: The main conference and exhibition component of the Service Design Conference Europe 2026, co-located with the Business Change & Transformation Conference and the Enterprise & Business Architecture Conference. This event offers a transformative experience, redefining understanding of Service Design and Design strategies. Key themes include 'Service Design & Customer Experience: Innovative approaches to improving service delivery, customer engagement, and user experience.' It features diverse tracks, inspiring keynotes, real-world case studies, and peer-to-peer networking.

38a7c77c418d8951299fa10df37a6adb.description: A series of workshops held as part of the Service Design Conference Europe 2026, providing a hands-on, transformative experience following the main conference.
